channel.title: Daily Flow
channel.description: Yoga & mindful movement for every day

item.title: 5 Morning Yoga Poses That Wake You Up Better Than an Alarm
item.description: Five gentle morning yoga poses to boost energy, ease stiffness, and start your day calm and clear — no experience needed, just five minutes.

item.title: Yoga for Beginners: 7-Day Starter Program
item.description: Start your yoga journey with this beginner-friendly guide
